name: grained.js — Film Grain Noise Overlay
description: Adds an animated CSS film grain/noise texture over any element for a premium cinematic feel. Great on hero sections and dark backgrounds.
head:
<style>
  [data-grained] { position: relative; isolation: isolate; }
</style>
body:
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/grained@0.0.2/grained.js"></script>
<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-grained]').forEach(function (el) {
      if (!el.id) el.id = 'grained-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2);
      grained('#' + el.id, { animate: true, patternWidth: 100, patternHeight: 100,
        grainOpacity: parseFloat(el.getAttribute('data-grained-opacity') || '0.04'),
        grainDensity: 1, grainWidth: 1, grainHeight: 1, speed: 0.8 });
    });
  });
</script>
